commit.subject: LU-17361 tests: debug lustre-rsync-test/2a
commit.message:
LU-17361 tests: debug lustre-rsync-test/2a

This is a fortestonly patch to debug lustre-rsync-test test 2a.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
  fstype=ldiskfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el9.4 serverdistro=el9.4 \
  testgroup=review-dne-part-5

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
  fstype=ldiskfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el9.3 serverdistro=el9.3 \
  testgroup=review-dne-part-5

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
  fstype=ldiskfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el8.10 serverdistro=el8.10 \
  testgroup=review-dne-part-5

Change-Id: If524fa53aac08a72fbb7792112a7a7892fe92947
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
